description_long: This is an adult male figure with a stocky build, standing upright with arms slightly extended outward. He is shirtless, revealing a natural skin texture across his torso, arms, and legs, and is wearing knee-length shorts. His hands are relaxed and open, and his feet are bare, with toes clearly visible. The head is bald on top with a short, closely cropped hairstyle on the sides and back. The figure's facial features are defined, and the overall body posture suggests a neutral, at-rest stance. The model displays realistic anatomical proportions and surface details typical of a human adult male.
description: A shirtless adult male with a stocky build, wearing knee-length shorts and standing upright with arms slightly outstretched. The figure is barefoot and has a bald head with short hair on the sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing the chest, facial features, and both arms extended outward, with shorts and bare feet visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, torso, and the relaxed posture of the left arm and leg.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back, shoulders, and the back of the shorts, as well as the back of the head and both arms.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, torso, and the relaxed posture of the right arm and leg.
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly outstretched
attribute_hairstyle: bald with short hair on the sides and back
